title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Core
description: Core cursed energy, jujutsu society, technique, Domain Expansion, Binding Vow, and spoiler-gate constraints for manga-primary Jujutsu Kaisen roleplay.
author: Saga

cover.alt: Deck cover for Jujutsu Kaisen: Core

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga mainline, including Jujutsu Kaisen 0 as prequel context and main series chapters 1-271.
continuity.notes: Anime-only changes, movies beyond Jujutsu Kaisen 0 adaptation differences, light novels, games, guidebook-only material, and Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo should remain separate overlay decks unless explicitly loaded.

license.notes: For local testing. Requires human canon review before reference release.
